productDisplayName: Nike Men Solarsoft Slide Black Sandals
description: nike showcases its versatility with this pair of Benassi Swoosh sandals, perfect for lounging. Designed with a laidback, minimal style, wear this with your favourite jeans on a lazy evening.UpperOne wide synthetic leather strap with perforations across the forefoot and midfoot with the nike swooshCushioned footbed made of rubberOutsoleTPU outsole with patterned lugs and brandingSandal CareWipe surface with damp, clean cloth to remove dustDo not machine wash or store in direct sunlight
